Vu Ha Phuong

Member

English Linguistics, Education

About Me

I am currently an undergraduate student at Vietnam National University, Hanoi, majoring in English Linguistics and Education. My academic interests focus on applied linguistics, language education, discourse analysis, and the integration of technology in language teaching and learning. I adopt an interdisciplinary approach that combines linguistics, pedagogy, and digital tools to explore issues related to effective communication, language acquisition, and innovative educational practices.

Education

  • Bachelor in English Linguistics
    International School - Vietnam National University, Hanoi, 2022 - present
